success: Your application has been submitted successfully!

fields.hearAboutUs: How did you hear about us?
fields.notes: Anything specific you want to work on? (optional)

1.title: Let's set up your free trial!
1.subtitle: Takes about 2 minutes. Helps us personalise your experience from day one.

2.title: Who are you?
2.subtitle: We'll recommend the best starting point based on your situation.

3.title: What's your main goal?
3.subtitle: We'll highlight the most relevant workshops during your trial.

4.title: Your experience & schedule?
4.subtitle: Help us match you to sessions at the right level and time.

5.title: One last thing!
5.subtitle: Then your trial is ready to go.

errors.stepFivePolicyRequired: Please check the box to agree before completing.

stepFour.scheduleTitle: When do you prefer to study?

completion.title: All done!
completion.description: Your free 14-day trial is ready. We've noted your goals and will have a personalised learning path waiting when you log in. Jon will be in touch to schedule your free 1-on-1 coaching session.

policy.text:
I agree to J-Global using my details to create my trial account and send onboarding information.

I can unsubscribe at any time. Privacy Policy
